fields.name: navigationalOrder
fields.label: Navigational Order
fields.description: Numeric value to control the custom order of level 2 and 3 header links. Lower numbers appear first.

fields.name: publicationDate
fields.label: Publication Date
fields.description: e.g. DECEMBER 15, 2025

fields.name: readWatchTime
fields.label: Read/Watch Time
fields.description: Select the estimated time required to read or watch the story content.

fields.name: storyReadTime
fields.label: Story Read Time
fields.description: Read time for written stories. This field is required.

fields.name: storyWatchTime
fields.label: Story Watch Time
fields.description: Define the number of minutes required to watch the story.

fields.name: ctaAltText
fields.label: CTA Alt Text
fields.description: Alternative text for the card CTA.

fields.name: warndeparturemodalpath

fields.description: Path to the Fragment used for the departure warning popup in this page.

fields.name: warnarrivalmodalpath
fields.label: Warn on Arrival Modal Fragment (Page-Level)
fields.description: Path to the Fragment used for the modal to show when user arrive at the page.

fields.name: blockHeading
fields.label: Block Heading
fields.description: Provide heading text for this set of accordion items.

fields.name: classes_allowMultipleOpen
fields.label: Allow multiple Accordion Items open
fields.description: By default when a user opens an Accordion Item the previously opened Accordion Item will be closed. Enable this to allow more than one Accordion Item open at a time

fields.name: classes_showExpandCollapseAll
fields.label: Show Expand/Collapse all button
fields.description: Show a button that allows the user to expand or collapse all Accordion Items with a single click.

fields.name: classes_iconType
fields.label: Icon Type
fields.description: Choose whether accordion controls use icon fonts or images.

fields.name: blockId
fields.label: ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this block

fields.name: classes_commonCustomClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Custom CSS class to apply to this block

fields.name: analytics_id
fields.label: Analytics Interaction ID
fields.description: Analytics Interaction ID used for tracking interactions with this block.

fields.name: classes_defaultOpen
fields.label: Default To Open
fields.description: If checked this Accordion Item will be open on page load.

fields.name: homePagePath
fields.label: Home Page Path
fields.description: Sets an explicit root (home) page for the breadcrumb. When provided, the breadcrumb begins from this path.

fields.name: homeDisplayName
fields.label: Home Title
fields.description: Overrides the display label for the home breadcrumb item. If blank, the page title is used.

fields.name: enableBreadcrumb
fields.label: Enable Breadcrumb
fields.description: Toggles rendering of the breadcrumb trail. Uncheck to hide the component output while retaining configuration.

fields.name: enableHiddenItems
fields.label: Enable Hidden Items
fields.description: When enabled, includes pages marked as hidden in navigation within the breadcrumb trail.

fields.name: enableCurrentPage
fields.label: Enable Current Page
fields.description: Controls whether the current page appears as the last item in the breadcrumb.

fields.name: useRedirectPageName
fields.label: Enable Redirect Title
fields.description: Uses the redirect target page title if the page redirects; otherwise uses the page's own title.

fields.description: Image used for overlay button

fields.description: Position of icon relative to button text

fields.name: playerMode
fields.label: Player Type
fields.description: Type of video

fields.name: accountId
fields.label: Brightcove Account ID
fields.description: Account of the video. Only one account can be used on a single page.

fields.name: playerId
fields.label: Brightcove Player ID
fields.description: Player ID for the video

fields.name: videoId
fields.label: Brightcove Video ID
fields.description: Video ID for the video

fields.description: Playlist ID for the playlist

fields.label: Video Content Layout

fields.description: If selected, playlist video thumbnails include title and time

fields.description: Caption title required to display below video player.

fields.name: captionDescription
fields.label: Caption Description
fields.description: Caption description required to display below video player.

fields.name: playButtonAriaLabel
fields.label: Play Button ARIA Label
fields.description: Applies to the play button in overlay as aria-label

fields.name: videoCaption
fields.label: Video Caption
fields.description: Caption Title for video used by screen readers.

fields.name: enableAutoplay
fields.label: Enable Autoplay
fields.description: If selected, this video will auto play when in view

fields.name: enableLoop
fields.label: Enable Loop
fields.description: If selected, a video/playlist will start again when completed

fields.name: enableCaptions
fields.label: Enable Captions
fields.description: If selected, captions will be displayed

fields.name: enableVideoChapters
fields.label: Enable Video Chapters
fields.description: If selected, a chapter's selection area will be viewable

fields.name: enableRecommendedVideo
fields.label: Enable Recommended Video
fields.description: If selected, on completion a list of recommended videos displays

fields.name: enablePlayerControls
fields.label: Enable Player Controls
fields.description: If selected a video toolbar will be available (play, pause, etc.)

fields.name: enableSocialShare
fields.label: Enable Social Share
fields.description: If selected, a social share button and overlay will appear

fields.name: enableTranscript
fields.label: Enable Transcript
fields.description: If selected, a transcript button will be displayed

fields.name: transcriptSource

fields.description: Select whether transcript is pulled from Brightcove or an authored link

fields.description: Define the show transcript button text

fields.name: hideTranscriptLabel

fields.description: Define the hide transcript button text

fields.name: transcriptClickBehavior
fields.label: Transcript Click Behavior
fields.description: Select what happens when the transcript button is clicked

fields.name: modalHiddenPanelId

fields.description: Provide an ID for a modal or hidden panel

fields.description: Provide a URL to a page containing the transcript

fields.description: Select Icon type for the transcript button

fields.name: transcriptShowImageIcon

fields.description: Image for show transcript action

fields.description: Font icon for hide transcript (Brightcove)

fields.description: Image for hide transcript (Brightcove)

fields.name: totalSlides
fields.label: Total Number of Slides/Items
fields.description: Number of sibling blocks to pull in as carousel slides. Leave empty or 0 to use inline slide rows.

fields.name: bypassCarouselOnMobile
fields.label: Bypass Carousel on Mobile
fields.description: Render items as a non-carousel list on small screens to improve usability/performance.

fields.name: startingSlideIndex
fields.label: Starting slide (index)
fields.description: Specify which slide is initially active.

fields.name: centerActiveSlide
fields.label: Center the active slide
fields.description: Centers the active slide when multiple slides are visible. Effective only when Number of Slides to show is greater than 1.

fields.name: enableLooping
fields.label: Enable Looping
fields.description: After the last slide, continue from the first slide seamlessly.

fields.name: enableNextPreviousControls
fields.label: Enable Next/Previous controls
fields.description: Show arrow buttons for manual navigation between slides.

fields.name: enableDotNavigation
fields.label: Enable Dot Navigation
fields.description: Show dot indicators representing slides for quick navigation

fields.name: carouselLabel
fields.label: Label (aria-label for carousel)
fields.description: Describes the carousel content for assistive technologies.

fields.name: previousButtonLabel
fields.label: Previous (aria-label for previous button)
fields.description: Accessible label describing the Previous control action.

fields.name: nextButtonLabel
fields.label: Next (aria-label for next button)
fields.description: Accessible label describing the Next control action.

fields.name: tablistLabel
fields.label: Tablist (aria-label for navigation list of items)
fields.description: Accessible label describing the Pause action for autoplay controls.

fields.name: itemLabel
fields.label: Set item (aria-label from slide title)
fields.description: When enabled, each slide’s aria-label is derived from its title, improving announce ability.
